description_long: This sculpture is a stylized stone bust reminiscent of the famous Moai statues of Easter Island, featuring a prominent elongated face with deep-set eyes, a pronounced brow ridge, and a broad, rectangular nose. The mouth is slightly open, giving the figure a subtle, enigmatic expression. The head sits atop a thick, rounded neck and a flared base that suggests a truncated torso or pedestal. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible stone texture and natural color variations in gray tones. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with a smooth, gently curved surface that tapers toward the base. The overall form is monolithic and solid, evoking a sense of permanence and ancient craftsmanship.
description: A rough-textured, gray stone bust with an elongated face and stylized features, reminiscent of a Moai statue. The sculpture has a broad base and a monolithic, ancient appearance.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the elongated face, deep-set eyes, rectangular nose, and slightly open mouth.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the prominent nose, angular jawline, and the depth of the facial features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved back of the head and the broad, flared base with minimal detail.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, emphasizing the nose, lips, and the overall thickness of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human head reminiscent of Moai statues
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
